from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from pyspark.sql import types as T
from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import *
from delta.tables import DeltaTable
import mysql.connector

from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, BooleanType, ArrayType, FloatType, LongType

works_schema = StructType([
    StructField("id", StringType(), True),
    StructField("doi", StringType(), True),
    StructField("doi_registration_agency", StringType(), True),
    StructField("display_name", StringType(), True),
    StructField("title", StringType(), True),
    StructField("publication_year", IntegerType(), True),
    StructField("publication_date", StringType(), True),
    StructField("language", StringType(), True),
    StructField("language_id", StringType(), True),
    StructField("ids", StructType([
        StructField("openalex", StringType(), True),
        StructField("doi", StringType(), True),
        StructField("pmid", StringType(), True),
        StructField("mag", LongType(), True)
    ]), True),
    StructField("primary_location", StructType([
        StructField("source", StructType([
            StructField("id", StringType(), True),
            StructField("issn_l", StringType(), True),
            StructField("issn", ArrayType(StringType(), True), True),
            StructField("display_name", StringType(), True),
            StructField("publisher", StringType(), True),
            StructField("host_organization", StringType(), True),
            StructField("host_organization_name", StringType(), True),
            StructField("host_organization_lineage", ArrayType(StringType(), True), True),
            StructField("host_organization_lineage_names", ArrayType(StringType(), True), True),
            StructField("is_oa", BooleanType(), True),
            StructField("is_in_doaj", BooleanType(), True),
            StructField("is_core", BooleanType(), True),
            StructField("is_indexed_in_scopus", BooleanType(), True),
            StructField("type", StringType(), True),
            StructField("type_id", StringType(), True)
        ]), True),
        StructField("pdf_url", StringType(), True),
        StructField("landing_page_url", StringType(), True),
        StructField("is_oa", BooleanType(), True),
        StructField("version", StringType(), True),
        StructField("license", StringType(), True),
        StructField("license_id", StringType(), True),
        StructField("doi", StringType(), True),
        StructField("is_accepted", BooleanType(), True),
        StructField("is_published", BooleanType(), True)
    ]), True),
    StructField("best_oa_location", StructType([
        StructField("source", StructType([
            StructField("id", StringType(), True),
            StructField("issn_l", StringType(), True),
            StructField("issn", ArrayType(StringType(), True), True),
            StructField("display_name", StringType(), True),
            StructField("publisher", StringType(), True),
            StructField("host_organization", StringType(), True),
            StructField("host_organization_name", StringType(), True),
            StructField("host_organization_lineage", ArrayType(StringType(), True), True),
            StructField("host_organization_lineage_names", ArrayType(StringType(), True), True),
            StructField("is_oa", BooleanType(), True),
            StructField("is_in_doaj", BooleanType(), True),
            StructField("is_core", BooleanType(), True),
            StructField("is_indexed_in_scopus", BooleanType(), True),
            StructField("type", StringType(), True),
            StructField("type_id", StringType(), True)
        ]), True),
        StructField("pdf_url", StringType(), True),
        StructField("landing_page_url", StringType(), True),
        StructField("is_oa", BooleanType(), True),
        StructField("version", StringType(), True),
        StructField("license", StringType(), True),
        StructField("license_id", StringType(), True),
        StructField("doi", StringType(), True),
        StructField("is_accepted", BooleanType(), True),
        StructField("is_published", BooleanType(), True)
    ]), True),
    StructField("type", StringType(), True),
    StructField("type_crossref", StringType(), True),
    StructField("type_id", StringType(), True),
    StructField("indexed_in", ArrayType(StringType(), True), True),
    StructField("open_access", StructType([
        StructField("is_oa", BooleanType(), True),
        StructField("oa_status", StringType(), True),
        StructField("oa_url", StringType(), True),
        StructField("any_repository_has_fulltext", BooleanType(), True)
    ]), True),
    StructField("authorships", ArrayType(StructType([
        StructField("author_position", StringType(), True),
        StructField("author", StructType([
            StructField("id", StringType(), True),
            StructField("display_name", StringType(), True),
            StructField("orcid", StringType(), True)
        ]), True),
        StructField("institutions", ArrayType(StructType([
            StructField("id", StringType(), True),
            StructField("display_name", StringType(), True),
            StructField("ror", StringType(), True),
            StructField("country_code", StringType(), True),
            StructField("type", StringType(), True),
            StructField("country_id", StringType(), True),
            StructField("type_id", StringType(), True),
            StructField("lineage", ArrayType(StringType(), True), True)
        ]), True), True),
        StructField("countries", ArrayType(StringType(), True), True),
        StructField("country_ids", ArrayType(StringType(), True), True),
        StructField("is_corresponding", BooleanType(), True),
        StructField("raw_author_name", StringType(), True),
        StructField("raw_affiliation_strings", ArrayType(StringType(), True), True),
        StructField("affiliations", ArrayType(StructType([
            StructField("raw_affiliation_string", StringType(), True),
            StructField("institution_ids", ArrayType(StringType(), True), True)
        ]), True), True)
    ]), True), True),
    StructField("institution_assertions", ArrayType(StringType(), True), True),
    StructField("countries_distinct_count", IntegerType(), True),
    StructField("institutions_distinct_count", IntegerType(), True),
    StructField("corresponding_author_ids", ArrayType(StringType(), True), True),
    StructField("corresponding_institution_ids", ArrayType(StringType(), True), True),
    StructField("cited_by_count", IntegerType(), True),
    StructField("summary_stats", StructType([
        StructField("cited_by_count", IntegerType(), True),
        StructField("2yr_cited_by_count", IntegerType(), True)
    ]), True),
    StructField("biblio", StructType([
        StructField("volume", StringType(), True),
        StructField("issue", StringType(), True),
        StructField("first_page", StringType(), True),
        StructField("last_page", StringType(), True)
    ]), True),
    StructField("is_retracted", BooleanType(), True),
    StructField("is_paratext", BooleanType(), True),
    StructField("concepts", ArrayType(StructType([
        StructField("id", StringType(), True),
        StructField("wikidata", StringType(), True),
        StructField("display_name", StringType(), True),
        StructField("level", IntegerType(), True),
        StructField("score", FloatType(), True)
    ]), True), True),
    StructField("topics", ArrayType(StructType([
        StructField("id", StringType(), True),
        StructField("display_name", StringType(), True),
        StructField("subfield", StructType([
            StructField("id", StringType(), True),
            StructField("display_name", StringType(), True)
        ]), True),
        StructField("field", StructType([
            StructField("id", StringType(), True),
            StructField("display_name", StringType(), True)
        ]), True),
        StructField("domain", StructType([
            StructField("id", StringType(), True),
            StructField("display_name", StringType(), True)
        ]), True),
        StructField("score", FloatType(), True)
    ]), True), True),
    StructField("primary_topic", StructType([
        StructField("id", StringType(), True),
        StructField("display_name", StringType(), True),
        StructField("subfield", StructType([
            StructField("id", StringType(), True),
            StructField("display_name", StringType(), True)
        ]), True),
        StructField("field", StructType([
            StructField("id", StringType(), True),
            StructField("display_name", StringType(), True)
        ]), True),
        StructField("domain", StructType([
            StructField("id", StringType(), True),
            StructField("display_name", StringType(), True)
        ]), True),
        StructField("score", FloatType(), True)
    ]), True),
    StructField("mesh", ArrayType(StructType([
        StructField("is_major_topic", BooleanType(), True),
        StructField("descriptor_ui", StringType(), True),
        StructField("descriptor_name", StringType(), True),
        StructField("qualifier_ui", StringType(), True),
        StructField("qualifier_name", StringType(), True)
    ]), True), True),
    StructField("locations_count", IntegerType(), True),
    StructField("locations", ArrayType(StructType([
        StructField("source", StructType([
            StructField("id", StringType(), True),
            StructField("issn_l", StringType(), True),
            StructField("issn", ArrayType(StringType(), True), True),
            StructField("display_name", StringType(), True),
            StructField("publisher", StringType(), True),
            StructField("host_organization", StringType(), True),
            StructField("host_organization_name", StringType(), True),
            StructField("host_organization_lineage", ArrayType(StringType(), True), True),
            StructField("host_organization_lineage_names", ArrayType(StringType(), True), True),
            StructField("is_oa", BooleanType(), True),
            StructField("is_in_doaj", BooleanType(), True),
            StructField("is_core", BooleanType(), True),
            StructField("is_indexed_in_scopus", BooleanType(), True),
            StructField("type", StringType(), True),
            StructField("type_id", StringType(), True)
        ]), True),
        StructField("pdf_url", StringType(), True),
        StructField("landing_page_url", StringType(), True),
        StructField("is_oa", BooleanType(), True),
        StructField("version", StringType(), True),
        StructField("license", StringType(), True),
        StructField("license_id", StringType(), True),
        StructField("doi", StringType(), True),
        StructField("is_accepted", BooleanType(), True),
        StructField("is_published", BooleanType(), True)
    ]), True), True),
    StructField("referenced_works", ArrayType(StringType(), True), True),
    StructField("referenced_works_count", IntegerType(), True),
    StructField("sustainable_development_goals", ArrayType(StringType(), True), True),
    StructField("keywords", ArrayType(StructType([
        StructField("id", StringType(), True),
        StructField("display_name", StringType(), True),
        StructField("score", FloatType(), True)
    ]), True), True),
    StructField("grants", ArrayType(StringType(), True), True),
    StructField("apc_list", StructType([
        StructField("value", IntegerType(), True),
        StructField("currency", StringType(), True),
        StructField("value_usd", IntegerType(), True)
    ]), True),
    StructField("apc_paid", StructType([
        StructField("value", IntegerType(), True),
        StructField("currency", StringType(), True),
        StructField("value_usd", IntegerType(), True)
    ]), True),
    StructField("cited_by_percentile_year", StructType([
        StructField("min", IntegerType(), True),
        StructField("max", IntegerType(), True)
    ]), True),
    StructField("related_works", ArrayType(StringType(), True), True),
    StructField("counts_by_year", ArrayType(StructType([
        StructField("year", IntegerType(), True),
        StructField("cited_by_count", IntegerType(), True)
    ]), True), True),
    StructField("cited_by_api_url", StringType(), True),
    StructField("updated_date", StringType(), True),
    StructField("created_date", StringType(), True),
    StructField("authors_count", IntegerType(), True),
    StructField("concepts_count", IntegerType(), True),
    StructField("topics_count", IntegerType(), True),
    StructField("has_fulltext", BooleanType(), True),
    StructField("fulltext_origin", StringType(), True)

# -------------------
# MySQL connection info
# -------------------
mysql_host = "oadatdbdev.mysql.database.azure.com"
mysql_db   = "OADAT_dataprep"
mysql_user = "oadatAdmin"
mysql_pass = "HideFromAll@123"
mysql_port = 3306
jdbc_url   = f"jdbc:mysql://{mysql_host}:{mysql_port}/{mysql_db}?useSSL=false"

# Partitioning
spark.conf.set("spark.sql.shuffle.partitions", "2000")   # tune later if partitions are too small/large

# Shuffle + heartbeat stability
#spark.conf.set("spark.network.timeout", "800s")
#spark.conf.set("spark.executor.heartbeatInterval", "60s")
spark.conf.set("spark.shuffle.io.maxRetries", "10")
spark.conf.set("spark.shuffle.io.retryWait", "10s")

# Skew handling
spark.conf.set("spark.sql.adaptive.enabled", "true")

# Broadcast joins
spark.conf.set("spark.sql.autoBroadcastJoinThreshold", -1)  # disable auto

pending_df = (
    spark.read.format("jdbc")
    .option("url", jdbc_url)
    .option("driver", "com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver")
    .option("dbtable", "(SELECT id, path FROM status_table WHERE status = 'pending') AS t")
    .option("user", mysql_user)
    .option("password", mysql_pass)
    .load()
)
pending_rows = pending_df.collect()

OUTPUT_FINAL_PATH ="abfss://openalex@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/processed_v1/works_csv_final"

for row in pending_rows:
    row_id = row["id"]
    INPUT_JSON_PATH    = row["path"]
    print(f"Processing {INPUT_JSON_PATH}...")
    try:
        works_raw = spark.read.schema(works_schema).json(INPUT_JSON_PATH)

        # =====================
        # AUTHOR DATA
        # =====================
        author_exploded = (
            works_raw
            .select(
                F.col("id").alias("works_id"),
                F.explode_outer("authorships").alias("authorship")
            )
        )

        author_data = (
            author_exploded
            .select(
                "works_id",
                F.lit(1).alias("any_author"),
                (F.col("authorship.is_corresponding") == True).cast("int").alias("corresp_author"),
                (F.col("authorship.author_position") == "first").cast("int").alias("first_author"),
                F.col("authorship.countries").alias("country_code_array")
            )
        )

        # =====================
        # COUNTRY INFO
        # =====================
        country_rows = author_data.withColumn("country_code", F.explode_outer("country_code_array"))

        country_info = (
            country_rows
            .groupBy("works_id")
            .agg(
                F.concat_ws(",", F.array_sort(F.array_distinct(F.collect_list("country_code")))).alias("country_codes_all_authors"),
                F.concat_ws(",", F.array_sort(F.array_distinct(F.collect_list(F.when(F.col("corresp_author") == 1, F.col("country_code")))))).alias("country_codes_corresp_author"),
                F.concat_ws(",", F.array_sort(F.array_distinct(F.collect_list(F.when(F.col("first_author") == 1, F.col("country_code")))))).alias("country_codes_first_author"),
                F.concat_ws(",", F.array_sort(F.array_distinct(
                    F.concat(
                        F.filter(F.collect_list(F.when(F.col("corresp_author") == 1, F.col("country_code"))), lambda x: x.isNotNull()),
                        F.filter(F.collect_list(F.when(F.col("first_author") == 1, F.col("country_code"))), lambda x: x.isNotNull())
                    )
                ))).alias("country_codes_best_author"),
            )
                )   
        # =====================
        # WORKS INFO
        # =====================
        def strip_openalex_id(col):
            return F.regexp_replace(col, "https://openalex.org/", "")

        def strip_doi_url(col):
            return F.trim(F.regexp_replace(col, "https://doi.org/", ""))

        cited_works_str = F.concat_ws(",", F.transform(F.coalesce(F.col("referenced_works"), F.array().cast(ArrayType(StringType()))),
                                                    lambda x: strip_openalex_id(x)))
        cited_works_count = F.size(F.coalesce(F.col("referenced_works"), F.array().cast(ArrayType(StringType()))))

        journal_issns = F.concat_ws(",", F.col("primary_location.source.issn"))

        topics_arr = F.slice(F.coalesce(F.col("topics"), F.array()), 1, 3)
        topic_list = F.concat_ws(
            "",
            F.transform(topics_arr,
                        lambda t: F.concat(strip_openalex_id(t["id"]), F.lit("|"), t["score"].cast("string"), F.lit(";")))
        )

        from pyspark.sql import functions as F

        # safe Column for optional 'type_crossref'
        type_crossref_col = F.col("type_crossref") if "type_crossref" in works_raw.columns else F.lit("")
        # Safe Column for primary_topic.id
        primary_topic_id_col = (
            F.col("primary_topic.id") if "primary_topic" in works_raw.columns else F.lit(None)
        )

        # Safe Column for primary_topic.score
        primary_topic_score_col = (
            F.col("primary_topic.score") if "primary_topic" in works_raw.columns else F.lit(None)
        )

        # Safe JSON stringify for apc_paid
        apc_paid_col = (
            F.to_json(F.col("apc_paid")) if "apc_paid" in works_raw.columns else F.lit(None)
        )

        works_info = (
            works_raw.select(
                F.col("id").alias("works_id"),
                strip_openalex_id(F.col("id")).alias("id"),
                strip_doi_url(F.col("doi")).alias("doi"),
                F.col("publication_year").cast("string").alias("year"),
                F.col("type"),
                type_crossref_col.alias("type_crossref"),  # safe fallback
                F.col("is_paratext").cast("string").alias("is_paratext"),
                F.col("open_access.oa_status").alias("oa_status"),
                F.col("open_access.is_oa").alias("is_oa"),
                F.col("open_access.any_repository_has_fulltext").alias("in_repository"),
                #F.col("apc_paid"),
                apc_paid_col.alias("apc_paid"),
                #F.col("apc_paid"),
                F.when(F.col("is_retracted") == True, 1).otherwise(0).alias("is_retracted"),
                F.col("cited_by_count").cast("string").alias("cited_by_count"),
                F.when(F.size(F.col("referenced_works")) > 0, cited_works_str).otherwise(None).alias("cited_works"),
                cited_works_count.alias("cited_works_count"),
                strip_openalex_id(F.col("primary_location.source.id")).alias("sources_id"),
                F.trim(F.col("primary_location.source.issn_l")).alias("journal_issn_l"),
                F.when(F.size(F.col("primary_location.source.issn")) > 0, journal_issns).otherwise(None).alias("journal_issns"),
                F.col("primary_location.source.display_name").alias("journal_name"),
                F.col("primary_location.source.type").alias("host_type"),
                F.col("primary_location.is_oa").alias("is_oa_hv"),
                F.col("primary_location.version").alias("version"),
                F.col("primary_location.license").alias("license"),
                strip_openalex_id(F.col("authorships")[0]["author"]["id"]).alias("first_author_id"),
                F.col("authorships")[0]["institutions"][0]["country_code"].alias("first_author_country_code"),
                strip_openalex_id(F.col("primary_topic.id")).alias("primary_topic_id"),
                F.col("primary_topic.score").cast("string").alias("primary_topic_score"),
                #primary_topic_id_col.alias("primary_topic_id"),
                #primary_topic_score_col.cast("string").alias("primary_topic_score"),
                topic_list.alias("topic_list")
            )
        )

        from pyspark.sql import functions as F
        from pyspark.sql.functions import broadcast

        # =====================
        # FINAL JOIN + FILTERS
        # =====================

        # If country_info is small (few MBs), broadcast it to avoid shuffle join
        joined = (
            works_info.alias("wi")
            .join(broadcast(country_info.alias("ci")), "works_id", "left")
            .select(
                F.col("wi.id").alias("works_id"),
                "wi.doi", "wi.year", "wi.type", "wi.type_crossref", "wi.is_paratext",
                "wi.is_oa", "wi.oa_status", "wi.in_repository", "wi.apc_paid",
                "wi.sources_id",
                F.coalesce(
                    "wi.journal_issn_l",
                    F.when(F.col("wi.journal_issns").isNotNull(), F.substring("wi.journal_issns", 1, 9)),
                    "wi.sources_id"
                ).alias("journal_issn_l"),
                "wi.journal_issns", "wi.journal_name",
                "wi.host_type", "wi.version", "wi.license", "wi.is_oa_hv",
                "wi.is_retracted", "wi.cited_by_count", "wi.cited_works", "wi.cited_works_count",
                "ci.country_codes_all_authors", "ci.country_codes_first_author",
                "ci.country_codes_corresp_author", "ci.country_codes_best_author",
                "wi.topic_list"
            )
        )

        # Apply filters in ONE step (more efficient)
        final_filtered = (
            joined.filter(
                (F.col("doi").isNotNull()) &
                (
                    F.col("journal_issn_l").isNotNull() |
                    F.col("journal_issns").isNotNull() |
                    F.col("journal_name").isNotNull() |
                    F.col("sources_id").isNotNull()
                ) &
                (F.col("is_paratext") == "false") &
                (F.col("year").cast("int") > 1998) &
                (F.col("year").cast("int") < 2026)
            )
        )

        # =====================
        # WRITE TO DELTA TABLE
        # =====================

        if DeltaTable.isDeltaTable(spark, OUTPUT_FINAL_PATH):
            # Append to existing Delta table
            (
                final_filtered.write
                .format("delta")
                .mode("append")
                .partitionBy("year")   # optional: only needed if you want partitioning
                .save(OUTPUT_FINAL_PATH)
            )
        else:
            # First time write
            (
                final_filtered.write
                .format("delta")
                .mode("overwrite")   # create new table
                .partitionBy("year")
                .save(OUTPUT_FINAL_PATH)
            )

        print(f"✅  Done with {INPUT_JSON_PATH}")

        conn = mysql.connector.connect(
            host=mysql_host,
            user=mysql_user,
            password=mysql_pass,
            database=mysql_db,
            port=3306
        )
        cur = conn.cursor()

        cur.execute("UPDATE status_table SET status='done' WHERE id=%s", (row_id,))
        conn.commit()

        cur.close()
        conn.close()

        print(f"✅  Updated the DB")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Error in {INPUT_JSON_PATH}: {e}")
